g.title: vandelay.bib_queue:item_attr_def->vandelay.import_item_attr_definition:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (item_attr_def) REFERENCES vandelay.import_item_attr_definition(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.bib_queue:match_bucket->container.biblio_record_entry_bucket:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (match_bucket) REFERENCES container.biblio_record_entry_bucket(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.queued_bib_record:queue->vandelay.bib_queue:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (queue) REFERENCES vandelay.bib_queue(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
